# Statistical Modeling & Machine Learning

## K-Means Clustering

{{< include _kmeans.qmd >}}

## Logistic Regression

{{< include _logistic_regression.qmd >}}

## Decision Trees

{{< include _decision_trees.qmd >}}

## Random Forests

{{< include _random_forests.qmd >}}

## False Discovery Rate (FDR) Control

{{< include _fdr_control.qmd >}}
